verifier_rubric: per-paper joint coverage of all K=4 candidate sub-mechanisms
rationale: M_2 (Krylov-Gram-Schmidt basis) and M_3 (embedding inner-product orthogonality among iterates) absent across all 9 papers. Iterative-CoT cluster covers M_1 strongly (PDR, AdaAnchor, Coconut) but not the Krylov-orthogonal-basis backbone. Pattern E preserved (primary FAIL aggregate vs verifier PASS per-paper).
